description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a UnitTest job that uses the python:3.6 Docker image, runs before_script commands pip install -r requirements.txt, python manage.py makemigrations, python manage.py migrate, and python manage.py collectstatic --no-input, then executes coverage run --include='add_friend/*,Dashboard/*,halaman_profile/*,update_status/*' manage.py test followed by coverage report -m, and runs on_success. Also in the test stage add a FunctionalTest job using python:3.6, whose before_script adds the Google Chrome apt repository, installs unzip, google-chrome-stable, xvfb, downloads and unzips chromedriver, installs requirements, runs makemigrations, migrate, collectstatic, and starts the Django server in the background, then runs python manage.py test; this job runs on_success but is excluded from the master branch. In the deploy stage add a Deployment job that uses the ruby:2.4 image, installs the dpl gem and Heroku CLI in before_script, then runs dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY, exports HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_APIKEY, and executes heroku run --app $HEROKU_APPNAME migrate, with an environment named production pointing to $HEROKU_APP_HOST.
